experiments: Different problems to be framed to enable students to understand the concept learnt and get hands‑on on various tools and software related to the subject. Assignments for ten to twelve lab sessions.

modules.title: Motivation for studying Quantum Computing

modules.title: Math Foundation for Quantum Computing
topics: Matrix Algebra: basis vectors and orthogonality

modules.title: Building Blocks for Quantum Program
topics: Architecture of a Quantum Computing platform
Details of q-bit system of information representation: Block Sphere

Useful states from quantum algorithmic perspective e.g. Bell State
Operation on qubits: Measuring and transforming using gates
Quantum Logic gates and Circuit: Pauli

David McMahon, “Quantum Computing Explained”, Wiley.
